proven.claim: PROVEN: for-of loop at lines 185-187 ran exactly changedFiles.length times
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 188
; PROVEN: for-of loop at lines 185-187 ran exactly changedFiles.length times
(declare-const changed_len Int)
(declare-const iterations_completed Int)
; Code transition: for(const f of changedFiles) iterates exactly changed_len times
(assert (> changed_len 0))
(assert (= iterations_completed changed_len))
; Negation: loop completed fewer iterations than the array length
(assert (< iterations_completed changed_len))
(check-sat)
